fields.name: department
fields.comment: Department ID from the available departments list, e.g. DEPT-001

fields.name: productsServicesNeeded
fields.comment: Products or services needed from this supplier

fields.name: expectedAnnualVolume
fields.comment: Expected annual procurement volume in EUR, e.g. 50000

fields.name: urgency
fields.comment: Request urgency: Normal, High, or Critical

fields.name: neededByDate
fields.comment: Date by which the supplier is needed, format yyyy-MM-dd

fields.name: additionalNotes
fields.comment: Additional context or notes for the procurement or QM team

fields.name: riskScore
fields.comment: Risk score assessment result from the agent

fields.name: status
fields.comment: Current status of the onboarding workflow

fields.name: matchedSuppliers
fields.comment: Existing suppliers matched during the duplicate check step

fields.name: policyValidationFindings
fields.comment: Policy validation findings saved from the most recent agent analysis run

fields.name: completedAt
fields.comment: Completion timestamp in ISO-8601 text format

fields.name: declinedAt
fields.comment: Decline timestamp in ISO-8601 text format, set only on the RED path

fields.name: auditTrail
fields.comment: Full ordered audit trail for this onboarding request
